feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CPI : How to get list of undeployed artifacts of a package via API
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on a custom UI5 app to display a list of all the undeployed artifacts from a specific package using the Integration Content API present on API Hub. I am not able to find any API which fetches the list of all the undeployed artifacts for a specific package.

API Hub - https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/resource/Integration_Flow

Can someone please help me how to achieve this?

Thanks,
Sagar Bansal

entry.title: ISA Segment issue for ASC-X12_856_005010.xsd
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am facing issue with ISA segemnt for ASC-X12_856_005010.xsd.

the issue is with the segment ISA having field D_105_1.As per the EDI rules we are passing the XML payload with ISA segments and using ASC-X12_856_005010.xsd in EDI converter.

XML paylaod is having D_105_1 and D_1-5_2 Fields and are carrying ZZ as value and passing it to converter and giving result in ISA segment as 

ISA|00|          |00|          ||TRIUMPH-JP     |ZZ|AMAZONJP       |240526|1653|U|00501|000000001|0|T|>

Means D_105_2 field value ZZ is coming in output (before AMAZONJP) as shown in above line. But D_105_1 field value ZZ is not coming in output (before TRIUMPH-JP) as shown in above line of ISA segment.

XML to EDI converter is working but it is not giving D_105_1 value in EDI format output

I have attached the XML payload which is created by using CPI data avialbe in typesystems (MIG) and passing it through XML to EDI converter.

Can somebody help, whether any ISA field names changed for 005010 version or anything i missed.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud outbound SOAP call SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am creating sales order in S/4HANA Public Cloud from EDI message via CPI using SOAP message SalesOrderBulkRequest_In (SAP_COM_0288). This interface is working as expected. Link to business accelerator hub.

Now, I want to capture the errors in CPI through an outbound call from S/4HANA system via SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out under the same communication scenario. Link

I have created the communication user and enabled the outbound service in communication arrangement.

 

Configured an iFow in CPI with the endpoint specified in communication arrangement:

 

But, still the iflow is not triggered and 302 (redirect) error is displayed in message monitoring app.

 

Is there any specific setting I am missing? Could you please help?

Regards,

Anupam

entry.title: Integrating Abby Vantage to SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for sap connectors for Abby vantage to integrate with SAP CPI. Does anyone know or have any leads?

Thanks,

Prasanthi

entry.title: How to pass header and line item xml body to the CPI Endpoint?
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, how to manage the header and multiple line item data dynamically in SAP CPI.

entry.title: Design and Discover title in SAP Integration suite is not showing copy and create
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am just trying to get familiar myself  with SAP integration suite. I have assigned all the necessary roles to my user id for designing and developing integration flow. Also have assigned all the capabilities for Cloud Integration and so on 

Screenshot for reference:

 

But I dont see Copy and Create in Discover and Design title of Integration suite.

Discover no copy 

Design no create

Can someone help me as to how can i get the Copy and create enabled.

#SAPIntegartionsuite

entry.title: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) using Date values
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need to  set up a filter condition on oData API (API_SALES_ORDER_SRV)

(CreatedByUser eq 'BTPDEVUSER' and (CreationDate ge datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}- ${property.p_daysInPast}' and CreationDate le datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}'))

however this filter condition could not help me to get the records at all.
Could you please provide some hints, how this filter condition would be set up

Thanks & Regards,
Sateesh N

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite API Management and Stage Relevant Configuration Parameters
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are running multiple sub-accounts (CF) representing different enviroments (dev/test/preprod/prod). Artefacts are transported via CTM. Now i'm facing the challenge that we have artefacts from the API Management (Proxy / Products) which contain relevant configuration per each stage. Both in the Custom Attributes of the Proxy, aswell as in the proxy policy aswell.

For example: Service Callouts to different hosts. Having boolean flags to control the proxy flow.

Right now when the artefact is transported we need to manually adapt these kind of configuration, which might be a bit too error-prone. As we need to do it for each transport from each stage.

Is there a more convenient out of the box way to pass some external configuration besides the transport itsellf. Just like having it with CPI Artefacts and MTA extensions?

I'm open for any help 🙂

 

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: Message getting stuck for AS2 receiver channel via Cert Auth from PI to CPI connection.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are checking the PI to CPI connection via Cert Auth with AS2 adapter and sending from and receiving in CPI system.

PI flow:

CPI flow:

We are using private key of PI system in the PI As2 channel and the certificate using in CPI system for authentication but still the message getting stuck in delivering state in PI only they are not reaching in CPI.

we have uploaded CPI certificates in PI system and PI key in CPI system. 

Can anyone suggest if any more details need to be maintained for successful connection.

entry.title: PI/PO To CPI Migration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are planning for PI/PO to CPI migration. We also have our S/4 Rise migration planned. So I would like to know if we should plan the PI/PO to CPI migration after the S/4 Rise migration or if we can start the PI/PO to CPI migration before that. What could be the pros and cons of doing the PI/PO to CPI migration before the S/4 Rise migration?

 

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Process Integration SAP Process Orchestration RISE with SAP 


Thanks and Regards
Sachin Kumar Singh

entry.title: Dear SAP Can you stop this notification in each refresh
entry.content:
Dear SAP Can you stop this notification in each refresh.

 

What is the planned date for 3.14 runtime, it is more than one year.?

entry.title: i am not able to view the graphical policy editor from sap btp on a trial account !
entry.content:
I was working on exposing an integration flow as an api journey(LINK) and noticed that i am not able to view the graphical policy editor. 
I checked all the roles and found i have all of them - note - its a trial account( not sure if it matters but wanted to mention it).
I checked the cache and cleaned it out, tried multiple systems and different browsers as well and does not work on any of them. 

Any help would be great.

entry.title: Very well explained. But any idea what will be the efforts for all these process combined?
entry.content: Overall efforts to implement this?

entry.title: Need to access add button in system message popup when opening Incoming Payment through code.
entry.content: I need to add the incoming payment but unable to access add button in  system popup message in c# code. Is there is a way to get the access to that pop up system message or we can restrict the pop up from opening.

entry.title: Send Asynchrnous Message from SAP OnPremise to 3rd party system using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have recently started working in SAP CPI. I am working a scenario where SAP OnPremise system has to notify 3rd party systems about the Business Partner Updates (BP update notification). This has to be asynchrnous and we publish the BP updates in the notification message.

How can we achieve this without using IDOC. All these days we were sending synchrnous messages using Gateway services to CPI.

Thanks and Regards,

Pallavi

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing - Customization for Messages without Integration Workflow Configuration
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For the message “Inspection Results Recording” there is no Workflow Configuration and we have following problem:

These are the CI Artifacts triggered from this Message.

We need to update the Bapi Service Processor (BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS) to send the SFC as parameter EXT_NO (Single-Unit Number for the Unit to Be Inspected).

What is the best way to make this kind of customization?

Another question: Is it possible to trigger another IFlow for this message? (without using an Automatic Trigger/Production Process Designer)

Thanks in advance

Gabriela

entry.title: Are we charged for enabling "Cloud Foundary" for enabling "Process Integration runtime"
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to use the Service Instance and Service Key for Inbound Authentication for Cloud Integration's i-flow by enabling the "Process Integration Runtime." To enable "Process Integration Runtime," we need to enable "Cloud Foundry" in our subaccount. I would like to know if there are any charges associated with enabling "Cloud Foundry" in the subaccount. If there are, how much does it cost?

Regards,
Ravi

entry.title: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_type= COLUMN during writing dataframe using jdbc
entry.content:
I have a apache spark dataframe, it has multiple columns with datatype of string, decimal, integer, boolean.

I want to write this dataframe to sap hana using spark jdbcDF.write.format("jdbc") . 

Problem: Spark dataframe is column type. BY default sap hana creates a table of row type. I want to be create a column type of table using jdbc options. But I could not find the solutions.

my code:

 

df.write.format("jdbc").option("driver", "com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver").option(
    "url", "jdbc:sap://10.10.xxx.xxx:30015/"
).option("dbtable", "SAP.example_table").option("user", "*****").option(
    "password", "********"
).mode(
    "overwrite"
).save()

 

Here I have used ngdbc jar (com.sap.db.jdbc.Driver)

I need to understand how can I create table with  table_type= COLUMN.

If I use the above code it will throw error saying 

 

com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [264] (at 117): invalid datatype: TEXT type is not supported for row table: line 1 col 118 (at pos 117)

entry.title: I am getting the error : 'Artifact upload failed due to an unexpected error.'
entry.content:
I am getting the error : 'Artifact upload failed due to an unexpected error.' when I am trying to upload any zip file of iflow. I have downloaded one iflow in a zip format and from one tenant and trying to upload that same zip file to another tenant. Then I am getting this error. 

Can you please help me on that?

entry.title: Table name in SAP for all attributes of NX CAD
entry.content:
Hi there,

I need the location or table name in SAP where the attribute value of constraints used in NX - CAD is stored

Thanks in Advance
